title: Nobel Prize 2021: Climate Modeling, Drug Production, Pain Treatments, Literature, Freedom of Expression, Causal Analysis
description: The Nobel Prize winners in various categories include Syukuro Manabe, Klaus Hasselmann, and Giorgio Parisi for Physics, Benjamin List and David W.C. MacMillan for Chemistry, David Julius and Ardem Patapoutian for Physiology or Medicine, Abdulrazak Gurnah for Literature, Maria Ressa and Dmitry Muratov for Peace, and David Card, Joshua D. Angrist, and Guido W. Imbens for Economic Sciences.

title: Anticipation Builds: 2022 Oscar Winners Awaited!
description: The article states that as of October 2021, the winners of the 2022 Oscar prizes have not been announced yet. The Academy Awards typically occur in late February or early March, and the updated information will be available after the ceremony.
